title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.300 - Short title
text:
100.300.  Short title. — Sections of this law shall be known and may be cited as "The Planned Industrial Expansion Law".
(L. 1967 p. 172 § 1) 
(1975) Held constitutional as not being special legislation because of limit as to cities over 400,000. State ex rel. Atkinson v. Planned Industrial Expansion Authority (Mo.), 517 S.W.2d 36.
